name: matrix_structured
description: Structured output: exact JSON, schema compliance, JSON arrays.

steps.name: ask_json
steps.input: Output ONLY valid JSON exactly like this: {"ok":true,"n":3}. No markdown, no explanation, just the JSON.

steps.name: ask_schema_json
steps.input: Output ONLY a JSON object with exactly these fields: name (string), score (number 0-100), passed (boolean). Use any plausible values. No markdown, no explanation, just the JSON.

episodes.description: Emit a JSON array of 3 color objects.

steps.name: ask_array
steps.input: Output ONLY a JSON array containing exactly 3 objects, each with a "color" field (string) and a "hex" field (string starting with #). Example format: [{"color":"red","hex":"#ff0000"},...]. No markdown, no explanation.
